info.description: ClashKing Go API documentation. This API is still under active construction, so use it with caution because endpoints and payloads may still change. Authenticated endpoints only. Use Authorize with `Bearer <access_token>` for protected routes. For the unauthenticated reference, see [public docs](/docs/public).
info.title: ClashKing API (Private)

get.description: Returns guild metadata for the requested server. The authenticated user must be a member of the guild.
Returns the authenticated user's guilds and whether the bot is present. Only guilds where the user has MANAGE_GUILD permission or is owner are returned.
get.summary: Get user guilds with bot status

post.description: Returns a minimal initialization payload for the mobile app based on the supplied player tags.
post.summary: Initialize all account data for mobile app

get.description: Returns internal bot cluster stats, system info, and database document counts.

post.description: Attaches a Discord account and stores its OAuth tokens for the current authenticated user.
post.summary: Link Discord to an existing account

post.description: Attaches email credentials to the authenticated account.
post.summary: Link Email to an existing Discord account

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's current profile information.

post.description: Creates a new roster for a Discord server.
Creates a new automation rule for rosters.

get.description: Returns all automation rules for a server.

post.description: Creates a new roster group.
Creates a new signup category.

get.description: Returns signup categories for a server.

post.description: Generates an access token for public roster viewing.
Refreshes member data from CoC API for one or more rosters.
Creates a copy of an existing roster.
Adds or updates members in a roster.

patch.description: Updates a single member's data in a roster.

post.description: Refreshes a single member's data from the CoC API.

delete.description: Removes a player from a roster.

post.description: Adds or moves the tag to the front of the user's bookmarks (limit 20).
post.summary: Add or update a bookmark for a user

post.description: Creates a new group for organising clans or players for a user.
post.summary: Create a player or clan group

delete.description: Deletes the group with the given group ID.

get.description: Returns the group document for the given group ID.

post.description: Adds a clan or player tag to the specified group.
post.summary: Add a tag to a group

post.description: Removes a clan or player tag from the specified group.
post.summary: Remove a tag from a group

get.description: Returns all groups belonging to the given user.

post.description: Adds or moves the tag to the front of the user's recent searches (limit 20).
post.summary: Add a recent search for a user

get.description: Returns banned players matching the query in the given guild.
get.summary: Search for banned players in a guild

get.description: Returns all roles of every type configured for the server.
Returns all autoboards for a server with post/refresh counts and limit.

post.description: Creates a new autoboard. Fails if the server autoboard limit is reached.

patch.description: Updates fields of an existing autoboard by ID.

get.description: Returns all banned players for a server.

delete.description: Removes a player ban from the server.

post.description: Bans a player on the server.

get.description: Returns category, text, and news channels for the Discord server, sorted by category.
Returns the full log configuration for every clan tracked on the server.
Returns all clan-level countdown types with enabled status and channel.

delete.description: Removes the webhook config for specified log types on a clan.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of log types to delete
parameters.name: log_types

put.description: Creates a Discord webhook and assigns it to the specified log types on a clan.

get.description: Returns detailed settings for a specific clan on a server.

patch.description: Partially updates the settings for a specific clan on a server.

get.description: Returns the full clan list for a server with live CoC API data.

post.description: Adds a CoC clan to the Discord server tracking list.
post.summary: Add a clan to the server

get.description: Returns a basic list of clans (tag+name) for a server.

delete.description: Removes a clan from the Discord server tracking list.
delete.summary: Remove a clan from the server

delete.description: Disables a countdown type for a server or clan.

get.description: Returns all server-level countdown types with enabled status and channel.

post.description: Enables a countdown type for a server or clan.

get.description: Returns all roles for the Discord server sorted by position.
Tests whether the bot has access to the Discord server via the API.

put.description: Sets the embed color (decimal integer) for a Discord server.

get.description: Returns all family-related role configurations for the server.

post.description: Adds a Discord role to a family role category.

delete.description: Removes a Discord role from a family role category.

get.description: Returns all player-Discord account links for server members.

post.description: Removes multiple player-Discord links for a user in bulk.

delete.description: Removes the link between a Discord user and a player account.

get.description: Returns the aggregated log configuration across all clans for a server.

put.description: Bulk-updates log webhook/thread settings for multiple log types across clans.

patch.description: Updates the configuration for a single log type on a server.

get.description: Returns all reminders for a server grouped by type.

post.description: Creates a new reminder (war, capital, clan games, inactivity, or roster).

put.description: Updates an existing reminder by ID.

get.description: Returns the role evaluation settings for a server.

patch.description: Partially updates the role evaluation settings for a server.

get.description: Returns all roles of a given type configured for the server.

post.description: Creates a new role of a given type for the server.

delete.description: Deletes a role by type and ID.

get.description: Returns the full settings document for a Discord server.

patch.description: Partially updates server-level settings (nickname rules, eval config, etc.).

get.description: Returns all strikes for a server, optionally filtered by player tag or including expired.
Returns all strikes and total weight for a player on the server.

post.description: Adds a strike to a player on the server.

delete.description: Deletes a strike by its ID.

get.description: Returns all active threads for the Discord server.

get.summary: Get ticket panels for a server
Get open tickets for a server

put.summary: Update clan for an open ticket
Update approve messages for a ticket panel

post.summary: Add a button to a ticket panel

delete.summary: Delete a button from a ticket panel

post.description: Normalizes tags and inserts any not yet tracked into the database.
Deletes the given player tags from the tracking database.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's linked Clash of Clans accounts in order.
get.summary: Get all Clash of Clans accounts linked to a user

post.description: Links a Clash of Clans account to the authenticated user.
post.summary: Link a Clash of Clans account to a user

put.description: Reorders the authenticated user's linked Clash of Clans accounts.
put.summary: Reorder linked Clash of Clans accounts

post.description: Links a Clash of Clans account to the authenticated user after verifying the player token.
post.summary: Link a Clash of Clans account to a user with verification

delete.description: Unlinks a Clash of Clans account from the authenticated user.
delete.summary: Remove a linked Clash of Clans account

get.description: Checks whether a Clash of Clans account is linked to any user.
get.summary: Check if a Clash of Clans account is linked

post.description: Verifies ownership of a linked account using the provided player token.
post.summary: Verify ownership of an existing linked Clash of Clans account

get.description: Returns all giveaways for a server split by status (ongoing, scheduled, ended).

post.description: Creates a new giveaway. Accepts multipart/form-data with optional image upload.

delete.description: Deletes a giveaway and its image from the CDN if applicable.

get.description: Returns a single giveaway by ID for a server.

put.description: Updates an existing giveaway. Accepts multipart/form-data with optional image upload.

post.description: Replaces selected winners of an ended giveaway with new ones drawn at random.

get.description: Returns the welcome panel configuration for a server.

put.description: Updates the welcome panel configuration for a server.
